title: lippia hassleriana
intro: Lippia hassleriana, also known as Brazilian lemon verbena, is a plant species belonging to the family Verbenaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce anxiety and stress due to its high concentration of essential oils, including citral and limonene. The health benefits of Lippia hassleriana include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of insomnia, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, Lippia hassleriana is often used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil to take advantage of its medicinal properties, and it is also used as a flavoring agent in foods and beverages.
